scripts.dev:web: bun run env:sync && bun run --cwd apps/web dev
scripts.dev:api: bun run env:sync && bun run --cwd apps/backend dev
scripts.dev:mobile: bun run env:sync && bun run --cwd apps/mobile start
scripts.dev:nodb: bun run env:sync && bun run dev:web && bun run dev:api && bun run dev:mobile
scripts.db:reset: bun run db:down && bun run db:up && bun run db:migrate:deploy && bun run db:generate
scripts.build: bun run build:api && bun run build:web && bun run build:mobile
scripts.lint: bun run --cwd apps/web lint && bun run --cwd apps/backend lint
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd apps/web typecheck && bun run --cwd apps/backend typecheck
scripts.test: echo Run tests from app directories
